name: Wanpy Canned Dog Food - Chicken Chunk 375g
description: Indulge your furry friend with WANPY Chicken Canned Dog Food 375g – a premium wet food crafted from real chicken and enriched with essential vitamins and minerals. This ready-to-serve canned delight is perfect for dogs of all breeds and life stages, from energetic puppies over 3 months old to active adults and senior companions. Made using high-temperature sterilization, it locks in nutrition, freshness, and safety without any preservatives. The soft, juicy texture ensures easy chewing and digestion, making every meal a tail-wagging experience. Key Ingredients Main Ingredients: Real chicken and chicken derivatives for high-quality protein. Vegetables: Carrots, green soybeans, and potatoes for added fiber and natural goodness. Thickeners & Stabilizers: Starch, carrageenan, and salt. Vitamins & Minerals: Vitamins A, B2, B3, B5, D3, E; calcium carbonate; sodium nitrate (for shelf stability). This balanced formula supports holistic health, free from artificial additives. Nutritional Analysis (Per Can) Nutrient Percentage Crude Protein 5.5% Crude Fat 1.5% Crude Fibre 1.0% Crude Ash 2.5% Moisture 85% Enriched with vitamins and minerals to promote strong muscles, healthy growth, a shiny coat, boosted immunity, and optimal digestive health. Feeding Guidelines Serve as a standalone complete meal or mix with dry kibble to add flavor and moisture. Suitable for dogs over 3 months of age. Adjust portions based on your dog's size, age, and activity level: Small Dogs (up to 10kg): 1/2 to 1 can per day. Medium Dogs (10-25kg): 1 to 2 cans per day. Large Dogs (over 25kg): 2+ cans per day. Benefits Balanced Nutrition: Ideal for all breeds and ages, ensuring comprehensive daily nourishment. Muscle & Coat Health: High-quality chicken protein builds strong muscles and promotes a glossy coat. Easy Digestion: Soft, juicy texture that's gentle on sensitive stomachs. No Preservatives: A natural, safer option for long-term feeding. Versatile & Tasty: Enhances any meal with its irresistible flavor. Always provide fresh water. After opening, refrigerate unused portions and consume within 48 hours for best freshness.
